ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the athlete */,
  "bodyweight_kg" REAL /* Current body weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "weight_class_kg" REAL /* Weight class of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Type of equipment used by the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the athlete is from */,
  "federation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the federation the athlete is associated with */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete registered with the federation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the athlete's profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_equipment FOREIGN KEY ("equipment") REFERENCES equipment_types ("equipment_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_weight_class_kg FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_kg") REFERENCES weight_classes ("max_weight_kg")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "place" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., SBD) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the competition (e.g., M-TJ) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the competition took place */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name or ID of the organization hosting the competition */,
  "number_of_athletes" INTEGER /* Total number of athletes participating in the competition */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (Squat, Bench Press, Deadlift) */,
  "total_lifts" INTEGER /* Total number of lifts performed in the competition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the competition (e.g., Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the competition */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the athlete */,
  "best_squat_kg" REAL /* Best squat weight lifted during the competition in kg */,
  "best_bench_kg" REAL /* Best bench press weight lifted during the competition in kg */,
  "best_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best deadlift weight lifted during the competition in kg */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted during the competition in kg */,
  "attempts_squat" INTEGER /* Number of squat attempts made by the athlete */,
  "attempts_bench" INTEGER /* Number of bench press attempts made by the athlete */,
  "attempts_deadlift" INTEGER /* Number of deadlift attempts made by the athlete */,
  "squat_1_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first squat attempt */,
  "squat_2_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second squat attempt */,
  "squat_3_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third squat attempt */,
  "bench_1_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first bench press attempt */,
  "bench_2_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second bench press attempt */,
  "bench_3_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third bench press attempt */,
  "deadlift_1_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first deadlift attempt */,
  "deadlift_2_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second deadlift attempt */,
  "deadlift_3_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third deadlift attempt */,
  "final_rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the athlete in the competition */,
  "points" REAL /* Points awarded to the athlete based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight class (e.g., 66kg, 74kg) */,
  "max_weight_kg" REAL /* Maximum weight allowed in this weight class in kilograms */,
  "min_weight_kg" REAL /* Minimum weight allowed in this weight class in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the weight class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., Single-ply, Multi-ply) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Squat, Bench Press, Deadlift) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., M-TJ, F-TJ) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the result affected by the penalty */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., missed lift, equipment violation) */,
  "penalty_value" REAL /* Value of the penalty, impacting total score */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the competition */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the athlete */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the competition */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "points" REAL /* Points awarded to the athlete for the rank */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was determined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., official, coach) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
